module:
Unit tests for vector utility functions.

These tests verify that all utility functions in the vector.utils module
work correctly and handle edge cases appropriately.

TestVectorFormatUtils.docstring: Tests for vector format conversion utilities.

test_vector_to_db_string.docstring: Test conversion to database string format.

test_vector_to_db_string_invisible_comma.docstring: Test specifically for the 'invisible commas' issue fixed in this refactoring.

test_similarity_to_score.docstring: Test conversion of raw similarity values to normalized scores.

test_get_metadata_source_type.docstring: Test getting source type from metadata.

test_get_vector_dimensions_app_config.docstring: Test getting dimensions from app config.

test_get_vector_dimensions_settings.docstring: Test getting dimensions from Django settings.

test_get_vector_dimensions_default.docstring: Test getting default dimensions when all lookups fail.
